title: MONDAY forms
excerpt: want to create a FORM and embed it on my website to collect contact details like name, email, phone number, etc., so that people who request service or information from my sales representatives can automatically have the…

posts.author: SasiKamer (Sasikamer)
posts.cookedHtml:
want to create a FORM and embed it on my website to collect contact details like name, email, phone number, etc., so that people who request service or information from my sales representatives can automatically have their details collected in my CRM, which I manage in Monday.com. However, I’m encountering a few issues when creating the FORM through Monday:

The FORM is not centered on the page, and I have no control over the font size or other styling.
There’s a sort of "Powered by Monday" branding at the bottom of the form, indicating that it was created using Monday.
After the customer submits the FORM, they are redirected to a "thank you" page that links to a specific website. I would like to customize the thank-you page as well.

Does anyone have ideas on how to solve these issues? Or should I just use a paid form tool that integrates with Monday.com? If so, which tool would you recommend?
